Title: Baxo
Content: Baxo is an AI-powered performance and growth platform that replaces outdated annual reviews with rapid, continuous feedback cycles. Built for agile teams, it transforms peer evaluations into real-time growth analytics through a clean, intentional, and minimalist interface.

Title: Final Command
Content:
Final Command Ministries is a global disciple-making movement focused on reaching the least-reached people groups in the world. Their mission is rooted in prayer and Spirit-led obedience, empowering ordinary believers to make extraordinary impact.

I partnered with 1851 Creative to lead a full website refresh for Final Command. Through a focused strategy session, we clarified their message around listening, obedience, and multiplication. The new site speaks clearly to two core audiences, those living the movement and those fueling it, while integrating stories of life change from around the world.

Title: Casting Crowns
Content:
Casting Crowns is a highly successful contemporary Christian music (CCM) group known for their impactful songs and active involvement in ministry. Since their formation in 1999, they have grown to become one of the most influential bands in Christian music.

They have sold over 13 million albums worldwide. Their songs have achieved significant streaming milestones, with more than 290 million streams for their album "Only Jesus," which includes their 15th career No. 1 radio single.

Grammy Awards: 1 win for their 2005 album "Lifesong," and 8 additional nominations.

American Music Awards: 4 wins out of 7 nominations.

GMA Dove Awards: 18 wins.

Billboard Music Awards: 2 wins out of 13 nominations.

RIAA Certifications: 1 2x multi-Platinum album, 5 Platinum albums, 2 Platinum DVDs, 7 Gold albums, 4 Gold DVDs, 5 Platinum singles, and 12 Gold digital singles.
SEO: Casting Crowns captured by STUDIO FINITY showcases dynamic performances and impactful moments. View striking photos and videos of this renowned Christian music group through a creative director’s lens.

Title: Compassion International
Content:
Compassion International is a humanitarian organization dedicated to relieving children from poverty in Jesus’ name. Founded in 1952, the organization works through child sponsorship programs to provide holistic care that encompasses physical, emotional, social, and spiritual support.

Compassion International operates in numerous countries, partnering with local churches to identify and support children in need. Their programs are active in regions such as Africa, Asia, Central and South America, and the Caribbean.

Children Served: Over 2.3 million children are currently supported through Compassion’s programs.

Medical Interventions: Compassion has provided medical care to 1.5 million children, including emergency surgeries and trauma counseling.

Nutritional Support: They have delivered 10.6 million family food packs and 7.6 million hygiene kits, significantly aiding in the fight against malnutrition and disease.

Title: Area 15 Ventures
Content:
Area 15 Ventures is a venture capital firm that builds and scales high-growth brands across real estate and the QSR space. The team partners directly with companies to provide capital, brand strategy, and operational support.

Their portfolio includes national franchises and emerging startups alike — backing brands such as RE/MAX, Daddy’s Chicken Shack, and Port of Subs. With a hands-on, execution-focused approach, Area 15 helps businesses grow faster, smarter, and with long-term impact.

Title: Fight The New Drug
Content:
Fight the New Drug (FTND) is a non-religious, non-legislative nonprofit organization dedicated to raising awareness about the harmful effects of pornography. Founded in 2009 by four college students, FTND aims to educate individuals on the impact of porn through science, facts, and personal accounts. The organization focuses on decreasing the demand for sexual exploitation and helping people lead lives free from the negative influences of pornography.

FTND's initiatives include educational presentations, documentary series, and a comprehensive online resource database. They promote healthy sexuality and informed decisions without affiliating with any religious or political agendas. FTND has reached millions globally, spreading their message through various channels and partnerships.

Title: Citizens
Content:
Citizens is a Christian rock band formed in Seattle, Washington, in 2011. The band features Zach Bolen, Brian Eichelberger, Adam Skatula, Dan Folgado, and Connor Hedge. They are recognized for their unique blend of indie, alternative rock, and Christian rock.

Their debut album, Citizens (2013), received widespread acclaim, followed by successful albums like Join the Triumph (2014), A Mirror Dimly (2016), Fear (2019), The Joy of Being (2020), and i can't find the edges of you (2023). Citizens have cultivated a loyal fanbase with their innovative sound and thought-provoking lyrics.
